attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

attributes.name: look
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: look
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

cssProperties.name: --uui-tag-font-size
cssProperties.description: overwrite the default font-size for the tag.

cssProperties.name: --uui-tag-padding
cssProperties.description: overwrite the default padding size for the tag.

cssProperties.name: --uui-tag-border-radius
cssProperties.description: overwrite the default border-radius for the tag.

cssProperties.name: --uui-tag-border-color
cssProperties.description: overwrite the default border color for the tag.
